provly.description: ProvLy is a digital home inventory vault that helps users document belongings, store receipts and photos, and generate organized reports for insurance claims and record keeping.

features.0: Care Autopilot: Deterministic AI that auto-schedules maintenance tasks based on your specific appliances and equipment
features.1: Claim Center: One-tap generation of comprehensive Claim Packs (PDF, CSV, and ZIP) containing all receipts, serial numbers, and photos
features.2: Warranty Tracker: A dedicated ledger that alerts you before your product protections expire

nexusbuild.description: NexusBuild is an intelligent PC building assistant that helps users choose compatible components, optimize performance, and plan custom computer builds with clarity and confidence.

features.0: AI Architecture Recommendations: Leverages local and cloud-based AI to suggest optimized builds based on specific budgets and performance goals
features.1: Compatibility Engine: Real-time checking of socket types, power requirements, and physical dimensions like GPU clearance

noobs.description: NooBS Investing Guide is a beginner-friendly investing companion that teaches core financial concepts through structured lessons, simulations, and step-by-step learning paths.

features.0: Paper Trading Simulator: A real-time market simulation where users can practice trading with virtual currency
features.1: NooBS Game Modules: Custom-built interactive mini-games that visualize complex concepts like compound interest, diversification, and volatility
features.2: Visual Portfolio Analytics: Premium data visualizations that make tracking performance intuitive and visually rewarding

neuromoves.description: Neuromove is a guided learning companion for young children, with structured routines, parent tools, and progress tracking.

features.0: Guided Activities: Step children through structured tasks with supportive prompts
features.1: Parent Tools: Manage child profiles, routines, and progress notes in one place
features.2: Progress Tracking: Keep learning goals, journals, and milestones organized

progress.0: Core learning activity flows and onboarding

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Northern Step Studio
about.subtitle: Northern Step Studio is a hands-on product studio building practical software across home readiness, learning, hardware planning, and service automation.

story.title: What This Studio Actually Is
story.p1: Northern Step Studio is a hands-on product studio, not a generic agency. We build software around specific real-world jobs: protecting a home inventory, planning a PC build, making investing easier to learn, supporting guided routines for children, and helping people improve credit with clearer next steps.
story.p2: Every app we build, every game we design, and every tool we create is crafted with discipline and precision. We don't chase trends—we focus on solving real problems and delivering real value.
story.p3: Our name reflects our approach: steady, deliberate progress. Each step forward is intentional, building toward something greater. We're not just making apps—we're building a studio ecosystem that will continue to grow and evolve.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Building Smart Tools for Real People
mission.desc: We exist to create digital products that empower users. From productivity tools that save time to games that bring joy, every product in our portfolio is designed with the user at the center. Simple. Beautiful. Effective.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: We never ship something we wouldn't use ourselves. Every detail matters.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: Complex problems deserve elegant solutions. We make powerful tools feel effortless.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We embrace new technologies and approaches to stay ahead of the curve.

craft.title: Craftsmanship
craft.desc: We take pride in our work. Every line of code, every pixel, every interaction.

apps.desc: Smart tools that help people learn, organize, and make better decisions.

faqs.q1: Are all products public right now?
faqs.a1: No. Some products are public, some are beta-only, and some are still represented on the site before wide release. The product page is the source of truth for readiness.
faqs.q2: How do I know which products are stable enough to try?
faqs.a2: Read the status badge, milestone checklist, platform, and CTA on the product page first. We use those signals to show whether something is live, in beta, or still moving through internal work.
faqs.q3: Are these all the same kind of app?
faqs.a3: No. The studio spans home inventory, PC planning, investing education, guided support for children, credit improvement, and service automation. The site is meant to make those lanes obvious instead of hiding them behind vague studio language.
faqs.q4: Does the studio use AI in every product?
faqs.a4: No. Some products are deterministic first and only use AI where it improves speed or clarity. Others stay local-first or workflow-driven by design.
faqs.q5: What is the best way to ask for access or support?
faqs.a5: Use the Contact page and be specific about the product, page, or workflow you are asking about. That gives us the fastest path to respond accurately.

support.title: Need a direct answer?
support.desc: If the docs do not cover your product, workflow, or access request, contact the studio directly.

mctb.label: Service Automation
mctb.title: NStep Missed Call Text Back
mctb.hero_subtitle: Turn Every Missed Call Into a Conversation.
mctb.hero_description: NStep Missed Call Text Back is the fastest way for local service businesses to recover leads. If a customer calls and no one answers, the system triggers an immediate text-back and structured reply menu to keep the lead moving.
mctb.never_miss_p1: NStep Missed Call Text Back is built for local service businesses that need to recover leads faster without adding complex software layers.
mctb.never_miss_p2: When you're out on a job or driving between appointments, missed calls are lost revenue. Our system ensures every caller gets an immediate response they can interact with.
mctb.never_miss_p3: By capturing intent through a simple reply menu, you know exactly what the customer needs before you even pick up the phone to call them back.

features.recovery_desc: Turn unanswered calls into active text conversations instead of lost leads.
features.qualification_desc: Collect what the customer needs before the owner has to step in.
features.followthrough_desc: Move interested customers toward quotes, booking, or a human handoff.
features.fallback_desc: Create human tasks when automation should stop instead of dropping the lead.

mctb.flow_desc: The interaction is simple on purpose. If you miss a call, the customer gets a text they can reply to in seconds without typing out a full message.
mctb.sample_text: Hi, sorry we missed your call. Reply 1 to schedule, 2 for a quote, 3 for urgent help, or 4 to ask a question.

reply_menu.schedule_desc: Move the customer into the booking path instead of waiting for a callback.
reply_menu.quote_desc: Capture quote intent fast and ask for the next details without losing the lead.
reply_menu.emergency_desc: Mark urgent work quickly so the owner or dispatcher can respond faster.
reply_menu.question_desc: Keep the conversation open when the customer is not ready to book yet.

compliance.0: NStep Missed Call Text Back is configured for businesses communicating with people who contacted the business first or requested service.
compliance.1: Supported workflows can include missed-call follow-up, booking updates, support messages, and service notifications.
compliance.2: Message frequency varies by workflow. Message and data rates may apply.
compliance.3: Reply STOP to opt out and HELP for help where SMS workflows are active.
compliance.4: Consent to receive messages is not a condition of purchase.

mctb.cta_desc: Ready to stop losing leads to missed calls? Tell us about your business and we'll see if the NStep Missed Call Text Back system is a fit for your workflow.

hero.badge: Starter automation for local service teams
hero.title: Stop losing service jobs to missed calls
hero.subtitle: A 24/7 response flow that texts back instantly, qualifies the job, and sends the owner a clean summary.
hero.description: This is not a generic chatbot page. It is a focused lead-recovery system for real service businesses that cannot afford to miss the phone and lose the next job. Plumbing is the current starter playbook because it is the fastest version to sell and demo, not because the system is limited to plumbers.

value_cards.title: What a buyer needs to understand in under a minute
value_cards.description: The page should answer three questions fast: what this is, what it does, and why it is worth paying for before the customer calls someone else.

what_is.label: What it is
what_is.title: A missed-call recovery system
what_is.desc: When a business misses a call, the system texts back immediately, starts the intake, and keeps the lead engaged until the owner calls back.

what_does.label: What it does
what_does.title: Qualifies the lead before you touch it
what_does.desc: It asks short service questions, checks urgency, captures the job location, and turns the exchange into a clean owner-ready summary.

who_for.label: Who it is for
who_for.title: Local service businesses that miss calls
who_for.desc: Plumbers are the current starter demo, but the same structure fits contractors, HVAC, electrical, garage door, cleaning, towing, and other service operators who cannot sit on the phone all day.

roi.text: If it saves one missed job per week, it can pay for itself.
roi.tags: Faster response. Better filtering. More callbacks.

workflow.title: The live flow should feel obvious
workflow.desc: Do not make the visitor imagine the system. Show the call trigger, the intake, the classification, and the owner summary in the same scroll path.

step1.title: Missed call triggers the response
step1.desc: The customer calls the business line, nobody picks up, and the system opens the text conversation without waiting on the owner.

step2.title: The customer gets a short intake
step2.desc: The script asks one question at a time, stays on topic, and keeps the customer moving instead of dumping a long paragraph on them.

step3.title: The job gets classified
step3.desc: Issue type, severity, urgency, location, and customer name are captured so the owner can act on something useful.

step4.title: The owner gets the summary
step4.desc: Instead of guessing from voicemail or raw texts, the owner sees the lead summary and knows whether to call immediately or queue it normally.

summary.title: The summary is the selling point
summary.desc: This is the moment that makes the product make sense. The owner does not need to read a voicemail transcript. They need a clean snapshot of the job and what to do next.

pricing.title: Clear tiers beat vague custom pricing
pricing.desc: Buyers should be able to see where they fit. The tiers are there to simplify the sale, not to make the system look more complicated.
pricing.recommendation_text: Most businesses should start with Starter, prove the workflow, and expand later.
